name: TariffX HTS Classifier
description: US trade compliance skill: HTS code classification, Section 301 tariff rates, UFLPA/AD-CVD compliance screening via TariffX cloud API. Bilingual (EN/ZH) docs with JSON output parsing. Requires TariffX API key.
review: Specialized trade compliance integration with real business value. First HTS classification skill — niche but no substitute exists. Requires TariffX commercial API key. US trade compliance is complex, time-sensitive, and costly to get wrong.
